title: Additional Commands
description: Additional Commands is a plugin for every server type. The plugin adds new commands like /workbench or /fly. New commands are constantly being added!
body:
### This plugin is not in development anymore. But it should also work in newer versions!

## What is this plugin for?
This plugin adds new commands like /fly or /workbench. [FULL COMMANDS LIST BELOW]

## Why do you need this plugin for your server?
The commands are perfect for any type of Minecraft servers. **_No matter whether citybuild, smp, events or just a normal survival world with friends!_**

## Extra informations
Every command has an own ****permission****!

**_Permission structure:_**
_AdditionalCommands.[COMMAND-NAME]_

### Command list
- workbench (aliases: wb)
- trash (aliases: bin, recycle, garbage)
- enchantingtable (aliases: et, enchanttable)
- anvil (aliases: av)
- loom (aliases: l)
- Stonecutter (aliases: stonecut, cutstone, sc)
- CarthographyTable (aliases: carthography, ct)
- SmithingTable (aliases: smithing, smith, smithtable, st)
- enderchest (alias: ec)
- speed [speed]
- fly [player]
- nightvision
- kick
- killall
- feed
  _and more.._
